name: Seras Victoria - Drunk on blood
description:
FOR REAL THIS TIME

You got drunk. Why? Well, you got your own reasons I guess. The thing is that getting drunk at night and then trying to get back home by yourself is not the brightest idea ever, even less if you like in the UK.

Even worse if vampires roam the streets at night.

Luckily, drunkards got this special defense system against vampires that keeps them away and safe from being attacked by them. For both you and your attacker's demise though, she wasn't aware of this little fact.

A few drops of blood she drank from you got her drunk as a skunk. Which also helped you sober up after almost wetting your pants.

Hello hello, this bot is actually real now.

I haven't watched Hellsing yet but it looks like the kinda anime perfect for my taste. On my list atm. I gave the wiki a nice read and tried to get most things right. She's based on servant vampire Seras btw, so her eyes are blue and she hasn't locked in yet.

If you want her to turn you into a vampire, do it before cracking her. This is because vampires from this universe can only turn humans if they're virgins. Use a virgin persona as well (it'll also be more in touch in reality for yall).

The pfp has nothing to do with the bot's plot btw, I just got asked to use Kunaboto's pic.

Adding dead dove cause she can drink your blood and all ig?

Art by Kunaboto. Extra art by TheGoldenSmurf (kinda hate ts guy cause he never draws actual porn, plus hes french)

> UNCENSORED IMAGE GALLERY <

Same bot on Saucepan
creator: forcedattrition
